name: gitnexus_native
description: Use the locally installed GitNexus CLI directly without MCP for indexing repositories and querying the GitNexus knowledge graph.

action.description: GitNexus action to perform. version checks the local install. analyze/list/status use the CLI. query/context/impact/cypher call GitNexus direct CLI tools without MCP.

repoPath.description: Repository path to analyze or use as the working directory. Defaults to the tool execution cwd/rootPath when available.

gitnexusBin.description: Optional absolute path to the GitNexus executable or .cmd shim. If omitted, the tool will auto-detect common install locations.

timeoutMs.description: Optional command timeout in milliseconds. Defaults vary by action.

force.description: For analyze: force a full re-index.

skipAgentsMd.description: For analyze: skip updating AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md GitNexus sections.

skipGit.description: For analyze: allow indexing a folder without a .git directory.

repo.description: GitNexus repo registry name for multi-repo queries.

taskContext.description: For query: task context to improve ranking.

goal.description: For query: what you want to find.

limit.description: For query: max results to return.

content.description: For query/context: include symbol source content.

file.description: For context: file path to disambiguate common names.

direction.description: For impact: blast radius direction. Defaults to upstream.

includeTests.description: For impact: include test files in results.

cypher.description: For cypher: raw Cypher query string.
